scripts.bundle:skill: pnpm build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const files=[['../../.agents/skills/web-fetch-to-markdown/scripts/fetchmd.js','../../../../lib/web-fetch-md/dist/fetchmd.js'],['../../skills/web-fetch-to-markdown/scripts/fetchmd.js','../../../lib/web-fetch-md/dist/fetchmd.js']]; for (const [out, rel] of files) { const content=['#!/usr/bin/env node','const path = require(\'node:path\');','const { pathToFileURL } = require(\'node:url\');','const target = pathToFileURL(path.resolve(__dirname, ' + JSON.stringify(rel) + ')).href;','import(target);',''].join('\n'); fs.writeFileSync(out, content, 'utf8'); try{fs.chmodSync(out,0o755);}catch{} }"
